explicit_text: I am Jeremy Logan Glick, born and raised in Hewitt, New Jersey, and one of six siblings from Oradell. I graduated from the University of Rochester and worked as a sales manager for Vividence, Inc. On September 11, 2001, I was aboard United Airlines Flight 93 when the hijacking occurred. Despite the terror, I calmly called my wife to describe the situation and helped organize the passengers to confront the hijackers. I cherished every moment with my wife and our three-month-old baby, and I told her I loved her before the final moments.
